papers.title: Efficacy and safety of sustained release ashwagandha root extract capsules on muscle strength and cardiorespiratory endurance in recreationally active individuals: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial
papers.translated_title: 缓释型南非醉茄根提取物胶囊对休闲运动人群肌肉力量与心肺耐力的有效性与安全性：一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照试验
papers.author: Thanawala, S.
papers.summary: Introduction: Previous studies suggest that conventional Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) root extracts may improve physical performance in both athletic and non-athletic populations. However, evidence on sustained-release ashwagandha formulations is lacking. This randomized double-blind, placebo-controlled trial evaluated the safety and efficacy of sustained-release ashwagandha root extract (AshwaSR) 300 mg in improving muscle strength in recreationally active healthy individuals. Methods: Eligible participants aged 25-50 years received AshwaSR 300 mg or placebo capsules once daily for 90 days. Changes in one-repetition maximum (1-RM) bench press, maximal oxygen uptake (VO2max), serum testosterone, creatine kinase (CK) and lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) concentrations, and quality of life (QoL using SF-12 questionnaire) from baseline till study end were evaluated. Results: Of 84 enrolled participants, 83 completed the study (AshwaSR, n=41; Placebo, n=42). Compared with placebo, participants receiving AshwaSR demonstrated significantly greater improvements in muscle strength and cardiorespiratory endurance starting from day 30 (1-RM: 4.69 vs 2.23 kg; VO2max: 9.99 vs 6.64 mL/kg/min; p<0.001), and sustained till day 91 (1-RM: 15.31 vs 7.33 kg; VO2max: 30.56 vs 18.14 mL/kg/min; p<0.001). In the AshwaSR group, total testosterone levels significantly increased from baseline to day 90 among men (mean increase = 121.43 ng/dL; p=0.024); while the improvement in testosterone levels among women was non-significant (13.34 ng/dL; p=0.545) and remained within normal reference ranges. The favorable numerical changes in CK and LDH concentrations were observed in AshwaSR group at the end of the study. AshwaSR group reported significantly improved quality of life at day 91 compared to placebo group (Mental component: 7.72 vs -4.66; p<0.001; Physical component: 5.23 vs -1.91; p<0.001). Reported adverse events in both groups were mild and transient in nature. Conclusion: Three-months supplementation with AshwaSR 300 mg/day was safe and effective in improving muscular strength, cardiorespiratory endurance, and overall wellbeing in recreationally active healthy adults. Clinical Trial Registry of India (CTRI) registration number: CTRI/2025/04/084383
papers.translated_summary: 引言：既往研究表明，传统南非醉茄（Withania somnifera）根提取物可能提升运动员及非运动员群体的体能表现，但关于缓释型南非醉茄制剂的证据尚属空白。本项随机双盲安慰剂对照试验评估了300毫克缓释型南非醉茄根提取物（AshwaSR）在改善休闲运动健康成年人肌力方面的安全性与有效性。方法：25-50岁合格受试者每日服用AshwaSR 300毫克或安慰剂胶囊，持续90天。评估基线至研究结束时卧推最大重复次数（1-RM）、最大摄氧量（VO2max）、血清睾酮、肌酸激酶（CK）及乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）浓度、生活质量（SF-12问卷）的变化。结果：84名入组受试者中83人完成研究（AshwaSR组41人，安慰剂组42人）。与安慰剂组相比，AshwaSR组自第30天起即显示肌力与心肺耐力显著提升（1-RM：4.69 vs 2.23 kg；VO2max：9.99 vs 6.64 mL/kg/min；p<0.001），该优势持续至第91天（1-RM：15.31 vs 7.33 kg；VO2max：30.56 vs 18.14 mL/kg/min；p<0.001）。AshwaSR组男性总睾酮水平从基线至第90天显著升高（平均增幅121.43 ng/dL；p=0.024），女性睾酮水平改善无统计学意义（13.34 ng/dL；p=0.545）且维持在正常参考范围内。研究结束时AshwaSR组CK与LDH浓度呈现有利数值变化。第91天时AshwaSR组生活质量显著优于安慰剂组（心理维度：7.72 vs -4.66；p<0.001；生理维度：5.23 vs -1.91；p<0.001）。两组报告的不良事件均属轻微且短暂。结论：每日补充300毫克AshwaSR三个月可安全有效地改善休闲运动健康成年人的肌力、心肺耐力及整体健康水平。印度临床试验注册中心（CTRI）注册号：CTRI/2025/04/084383

papers.title: Factors associated with the readiness assessment of health facility services in Yaounde, Cameroon
papers.translated_title: 喀麦隆雅温得卫生机构服务准备评估的相关因素
papers.author: Tedjo Pokam, G. O.
papers.summary: Introduction Reliable information on service readiness is essential for strengthening health systems and advancing universal health coverage. In Cameroon, structural imbalances and the predominance of private-sector facilities raise concerns regarding the operational capacity of health facilities to deliver essential services. This study aimed to determine factors associated with health facility readiness in Yaounde to inform evidence-based policy and service delivery improvements. Methods A cross-sectional analytical study was conducted from November 4 to December 27 2024 among health facilities in Yaounde. Data were collected using the World Health Organization Service Availability and Readiness Assessment (SARA) tool. Readiness was measured across five domains (1) trained staff and guidelines; (2) essential equipment; (3) standard precautions for infection prevention; (4) diagnostic capacity; and (5) essential medicines), comprising 47 tracer items. Facilities scoring [≥]80% were classified as having good readiness. Bivariate analyses and multivariate logistic regression were performed to identify factors associated with good readiness. Results A total of 205 health facilities were surveyed; most were urban (97.6%), private secular (89.8%), and categorized as 6th level (86.8%). Overall, 57.1% (117/205) achieved good readiness. Readiness varied significantly across health districts (p=0.015), with Efoulan (78.8%) performing highest. In multivariate analysis, absence of Prevention of Mother-to-Child Transmission (PMTCT) services (aOR=0.17; 95% CI: 0.05-0.55; p=0.003) and absence of childbirth services (aOR=0.18; 95% CI: 0.06-0.55; p=0.003) were independently associated with lower odds of good readiness. Conclusions Only slightly more than half of facilities in Yaounde met the operational readiness benchmark. Availability of PMTCT and childbirth services appears to be a strong indicator of broader facility preparedness. Strengthening maternal and child health service capacity may serve as a strategic entry point for improving overall facility readiness and advancing equitable health system strengthening in Cameroon.
papers.translated_summary: 引言 关于服务准备度的可靠信息对于加强卫生系统和推进全民健康覆盖至关重要。在喀麦隆，结构性失衡以及私营部门机构占主导地位的情况引发了对卫生机构提供基本服务运营能力的担忧。本研究旨在确定雅温得卫生机构准备度的相关因素，为循证政策和服务交付改进提供依据。方法 于2024年11月4日至12月27日期间，在雅温得卫生机构中开展了一项横断面分析研究。采用世界卫生组织服务可用性和准备度评估（SARA）工具收集数据。准备度从五个维度进行测量：（1）受过培训的工作人员和指南；（2）基本设备；（3）感染预防标准预防措施；（4）诊断能力；（5）基本药物，共包含47个追踪指标。得分≥80%的机构被归类为准备度良好。采用双变量分析和多变量逻辑回归来确定与良好准备度相关的因素。结果 共调查了205家卫生机构；大多数位于城市（97.6%）、为私立世俗机构（89.8%），且归类为第六级（86.8%）。总体而言，57.1%（117/205）的机构达到了良好准备度。各卫生区的准备度差异显著（p=0.015），其中Efoulan区表现最高（78.8%）。在多变量分析中，缺乏预防母婴传播（PMTCT）服务（调整后优势比aOR=0.17；95%置信区间CI：0.05-0.55；p=0.003）和缺乏分娩服务（aOR=0.18；95% CI：0.06-0.55；p=0.003）与良好准备度几率较低独立相关。结论 雅温得仅有略超过半数的机构达到了运营准备度基准。PMTCT和分娩服务的可用性似乎是更广泛机构准备度的一个有力指标。加强妇幼保健服务能力可作为改善整体机构准备度及推进喀麦隆公平卫生系统强化的战略切入点。

papers.title: Investigation of the continuous spread of SARS-CoV-2 in the post pandemic time - Insights into the reason for the sustained spread despite the establishment of population immunity
papers.translated_title: 后疫情时代SARS-CoV-2持续传播的调查——对尽管建立群体免疫仍持续传播原因的见解
papers.author: Yi, B.
papers.summary: In spite of well-established global immune landscape, SARS-CoV-2 is still able to further spread and continue causing infection waves. The current understanding about the reason behind is limited, and it is still difficult to predict the evolution or spreading tread of SARS-CoV-2. Therefore, it is necessary to investigate whether the establishment of population immunity has changed the virus evolution or spreading pattern. In this investigation, one overall analysis of the SARS-CoV-2 spreading in the past several years have been carried out through one thorough genomic epidemiology study, with Germany being chosen as one representative location in view of the systemic efforts for genomic surveillance. The growth advantage of a few predominant variants in its early spreading period has been evaluated through a logistic regression model. The results have revealed that the major circulating SARS-CoV-2 variants since 2023 are mainly derived from the Omicron BA.2 family. Since middle of 2024, most predominant variants were produced primarily through recombination, indicating that the evolution derived from recombination might be the major driving force for the continuous spread of SARS-CoV-2 despite the existence of population immunity. Furthermore, the lower growth advantage of recently emerged variants might possibly lead to a tread of reduction in the frequency of infection wave. The information revealed from this investigation suggests that although short-term spreading tread can be affected by specific virus feature as well as local immunity landscape, the long-term spreading tread is mainly decided by the genomic diversity of the viruses, and can be predicted through phylogenetic and genomic epidemiology investigation. The results have emphasized the importance of maintaining the efforts for genomic surveillance of SARS-CoV-2, which is essential from both medical and research perspectives.
papers.translated_summary: 尽管全球免疫格局已较为完善，SARS-CoV-2仍能持续传播并引发感染波。目前对其背后原因的认识有限，且难以预测病毒的进化或传播趋势。因此，有必要探究群体免疫的建立是否改变了病毒的进化或传播模式。本研究通过全面的基因组流行病学分析，对过去几年SARS-CoV-2的传播进行了整体研究，并选择德国作为代表性地点（因其系统性基因组监测工作）。通过逻辑回归模型评估了早期传播阶段几个优势变异株的生长优势。结果显示，2023年以来主要流行的SARS-CoV-2变异株主要源自Omicron BA.2家族。自2024年中期起，多数优势变异株主要通过重组产生，表明尽管存在群体免疫，重组驱动的进化可能是SARS-CoV-2持续传播的主要动力。此外，近期出现的变异株生长优势较低，可能导致感染波频率降低的趋势。本研究揭示的信息表明，虽然短期传播趋势受特定病毒特征和局部免疫格局影响，但长期传播趋势主要由病毒基因组多样性决定，可通过系统发育和基因组流行病学研究进行预测。研究结果强调了维持SARS-CoV-2基因组监测工作的重要性，这对医学和研究领域均具有关键意义。

papers.title: CUOREMA: Immersive Bio & Behavioral Feedback and Digital Interventions for Cardiac Rehabilitation - Exploratory Analysis
papers.translated_title: CUOREMA：用于心脏康复的沉浸式生物与行为反馈及数字干预——探索性分析
papers.author: Svihrova, R.
papers.summary: Cardiac rehabilitation is critical for secondary prevention, yet long-term adherence remains low. We present CUOREMA, a new personalized mobile health system integrating self-monitoring diaries, wearable data, virtual coaching, and reinforcement learning-enhanced adaptive interventions to support lifestyle change during and after outpatient cardiac rehabilitation. In a six-month two-center feasibility study (N = 53, Switzerland and France), we evaluated usability, engagement patterns, and preliminary health-related outcomes. Attrition was high: only 19% of participants used the app on more than 100 days, and questionnaire response rates declined from 55% at baseline to 13% at six months. Despite these limitations, exploratory data-driven analysis revealed three distinct engagement clusters (dropout, sporadic, and consistent), which were further supported by matching patterns in app component usage, medication diary adoption, and smartwatch wearing time. Engagement clusters were not associated with demographic factors; instead, psychological themes of patients personal goals suggested that intrinsic motivation characterized sustained users, whereas extrinsic motivation predominated among early dropouts. User experience was rated positively, and validated questionnaire scores showed no deterioration over time. One center demonstrated a statistically significant improvement in 6-minute walking test performance, though the study was not powered to detect clinical outcomes and selective dropout cannot be ruled out. These findings highlight engagement variability as a central challenge in digital cardiac rehabilitation and suggest that tailoring interventions to individual motivational profiles may improve long-term adherence.
papers.translated_summary: 心脏康复对二级预防至关重要，但长期依从性仍然较低。我们提出CUOREMA系统，这是一种新型个性化移动健康系统，整合了自我监测日记、可穿戴设备数据、虚拟辅导以及强化学习增强的自适应干预措施，旨在支持门诊心脏康复期间及康复后的生活方式改变。在一项为期六个月的双中心可行性研究（瑞士和法国，N=53）中，我们评估了可用性、参与模式及初步健康相关结局。参与者流失率较高：仅19%的参与者使用应用超过100天，问卷回复率从基线期的55%下降至六个月时的13%。尽管存在这些局限，探索性数据驱动分析揭示了三种不同的参与集群（退出型、间歇型与持续型），应用组件使用模式、药物日记采纳率及智能手表佩戴时间的匹配数据进一步支持了这一分类。参与集群与人口统计学因素无关；相反，患者个人目标的心理主题表明，内在动机是持续使用者的特征，而外在动机在早期退出者中占主导。用户体验评价积极，验证问卷得分随时间推移未出现恶化。其中一个中心在六分钟步行测试表现上显示出统计学显著改善，但该研究未具备检测临床结局的统计效力，且选择性退出无法排除。这些发现凸显了参与度差异性是数字心脏康复的核心挑战，提示针对个体动机特征定制干预措施可能改善长期依从性。

papers.title: Health-economic burden of chikungunya infection and potential cost-effectiveness of preventive vaccination in 31 countries
papers.translated_title: 基孔肯雅热感染的健康经济负担及31个国家预防性疫苗接种的潜在成本效益
papers.author: Zhou, J.
papers.summary: As the first chikungunya vaccines become available, estimates of their cost-effectiveness are needed. We developed a modelling framework to project the health-economic burden of chikungunya across 31 countries. We simulated several preventive vaccination campaigns and estimated threshold vaccination costs as the cumulative societal costs averted per vaccine dose. From 2025 to 2050, we projected a cumulative 5.96 million (5.10 million-6.93 million) DALYs and $76.5 billion ($57.4 billion-$95.7 billion) societal costs. A five-year population-wide campaign targeting 50% of individuals aged [≥]12 years, followed by a ten-year annual routine adolescent vaccination programme, averted 681,000 (569,000-802,000) DALYs and $11.8 billion ($8.73 billion-$14.9 billion) societal costs. Standalone population-wide campaigns were the most cost-effective, with threshold vaccination costs ranging from $1.11 ($0.77-$1.44) in the Democratic Republic of Congo to $48.1 ($36.0-$60.3) in Panama. Preventive deployment of a chikungunya vaccine with a favourable safety profile could substantially reduce the future burden of chikungunya across endemic settings.
papers.translated_summary: 随着首批基孔肯雅疫苗问世，亟需评估其成本效益。我们构建了一个建模框架，预测31个国家基孔肯雅病的健康经济负担。通过模拟多种预防性疫苗接种方案，以每剂疫苗避免的累计社会成本作为阈值接种成本。预测2025-2050年间，累计将产生596万（510万-693万）伤残调整生命年（DALYs）和765亿美元（574亿-957亿美元）社会成本。针对12岁及以上人群50%覆盖率的五年全民接种计划，配合后续十年年度青少年常规免疫，可避免68.1万（56.9万-80.2万）DALYs和118亿美元（87.3亿-149亿美元）社会成本。独立全民接种方案最具成本效益，阈值接种成本从刚果民主共和国的1.11美元（0.77-1.44美元）到巴拿马的48.1美元（36.0-60.3美元）不等。部署安全性良好的基孔肯雅疫苗进行预防性接种，可显著减轻流行地区未来的疾病负担。

papers.title: Optimization of Pharmacist Medication Management and Mortality in the Intensive Care Unit
papers.translated_title: 重症监护室中药师药物管理的优化与死亡率
papers.author: Smith, S. E.
papers.summary: RationaleMedication-related morbidity due to inappropriate prescribing, delays in appropriate treatment, and adverse drug events contributes to ICU patient mortality. Comprehensive medication management (CMM) is a care standard provided by pharmacists in collaboration with the interprofessional team. Optimizing ICU pharmacist workload via the pharmacist-to-patient ratio while ensuring daily CMM may reduce mortality. ObjectivesThis study examined whether ICU pharmacist staffing, measured by the pharmacist-to-patient ratio and absence of comprehensive medication management (CMM), was associated with in-hospital mortality among critically ill adults. MethodsAdults admitted to an ICU from 64 centers (in the United States, Jordan, and Saudi Arabia) were enrolled in a multicenter observational study that collected patient and team staffing data from August 2023-January 2025. The primary outcome was in-hospital mortality. The primary exposure was the patient-level pharmacist-to-patient ratio averaged over the ICU stay. A secondary exposure was the absence of CMM for at least 1 day. Multivariable generalized estimating equations (GEE) were used to estimate associations with in-hospital mortality, accounting for clustering by center and adjusting for patient-, ICU-, and hospital-level covariates. Measurements and Main ResultsThe 28,795 patients enrolled had a median (IQR) pharmacist-to-patient ratio of 1:17 (13-23). For every one patient increase in the pharmacist-to-patient ratio, the odds of mortality increased by 1% (Odds Ratio (OR) 1.01, 95% Confidence Interval (CI) 1.00-1.01, p=0.04). Patients without pharmacist CMM for 1 day had an increased risk of mortality of 20% (OR 1.20, 95% CI 1.03-1.40, p=0.02). The odds of hospital mortality were lower in a pharmacist-to-patient ratio of 1:7-15 compared to 1:16-46 (OR 1.10, 95% CI 1.00-1.22). ConclusionsIncreasing pharmacist-to-patient ratios and the absence of pharmacist CMM every day were both associated with an increased risk of in-hospital mortality.
papers.translated_summary: 研究背景：不当用药、治疗延迟及药物不良事件导致的药物相关并发症是ICU患者死亡的重要原因。综合用药管理（CMM）是药师与跨专业团队协作提供的标准照护模式。通过优化药师-患者配比确保每日CMM实施，可能降低死亡率。研究目的：本研究旨在评估ICU药师配置（以药师-患者配比及CMM缺失情况为指标）与危重症成人患者住院死亡率的相关性。研究方法：2023年8月至2025年1月期间，来自64个中心（美国、约旦、沙特阿拉伯）的ICU成年患者纳入多中心观察性研究，收集患者及团队配置数据。主要结局为住院死亡率。主要暴露因素为ICU住院期间患者层面的平均药师-患者配比，次要暴露因素为至少1天未实施CMM。采用多变量广义估计方程（GEE）评估与住院死亡率的相关性，通过中心聚类校正并调整患者、ICU及医院层面协变量。测量与主要结果：纳入28,795例患者，中位药师-患者配比为1:17（四分位距13-23）。药师-患者配比每增加1例患者，死亡风险增加1%（比值比OR 1.01，95%置信区间CI 1.00-1.01，p=0.04）。患者缺失1天药师CMM时，死亡风险增加20%（OR 1.20，95% CI 1.03-1.40，p=0.02）。与1:16-46配比组相比，1:7-15配比组的住院死亡风险更低（OR 1.10，95% CI 1.00-1.22）。结论：药师-患者配比升高及每日药师CMM缺失均与住院死亡风险增加显著相关。

papers.title: Dexmedetomidine as a Perioperative Adjunct in Valvular Cardiac Surgery
papers.translated_title: 右美托咪定作为心脏瓣膜手术围术期辅助用药
papers.author: Harshappan, J.
papers.summary: Background: Valvular heart surgery is associated with considerable perioperative risks including hemodynamic instability, arrhythmias, renal dysfunction and prolonged ICU stay. Dexmedetomidine a selective alpha 2-adrenoceptor agonist, provides sedation and sympatholysis and has been investigated as a cardioprotective adjunct. Objectives: To evaluate the effects of dexmedetomidine on intraoperative hemodynamic stability and postoperative outcomes in adult patients undergoing valvular replacement surgery. Methods: In this retrospective study, 154 patients who underwent valvular surgery under cardiopulmonary bypass between January 2022 and June 2023 were analyzed. Patients were divided into Group C (control, n=77) and Group D (dexmedetomidine, n=77). Group D received a continuous infusion of dexmedetomidine (0.5 ug/kg/hr) from induction until the end of surgery. Hemodynamic and depth of sedation parameters (HR, MAP, CVP, NIRS, entropy) were measured at predefined intraoperative time points. Postoperative outcomes included time of extubation, atrial fibrillation (AF), acute kidney injury (AKI), Type 1 neurological injury, reintubation, reoperation, ICU readmission, ICU length of stay (LOS), and 30-day mortality. Results: Baseline demographics were similar between groups. Group D exhibited significantly lower HR at post-induction, sternotomy, and pericardiotomy compared with Group C (p<0.001 at all three time points). MAP was comparable between groups at post-induction, sternotomy, and pericardiotomy, although Group D showed a significantly higher MAP at 5 minutes after protamine administration (77.36 +/- 7.66 vs. 73.56 +/- 8.16 mmHg, p=0.003). ICU LOS was numerically shorter in Group D but did not reach statistical significance (8.19 +/- 4.51 vs. 8.68 +/- 3.88 days, p=0.480). Time to extubation was also numerically lower in Group D but was not statistically significant (173.04 +/- 377.63 vs. 192.10 +/- 352.61 hours, p=0.747). Postoperative complications were numerically lower in Group D, including AF (11.7% vs. 13.0%, p=1.000), AKI (11.7% vs. 14.3%, p=0.811), reintubation (9.1% vs. 10.4%, p=1.000), reoperation (10.4% vs. 13.0%, p=0.803), Type 1 neurological injury (11.7% vs. 13.0%, p=1.000), and ICU readmission (11.7% vs. 13.0%, p=1.000), but these differences were not statistically significant. Thirty-day mortality was also numerically lower in Group D but not statistically significant (11.7% vs. 14.3%, p=0.811). Conclusion: Dexmedetomidine use during valvular cardiac surgery was associated with improved intraoperative hemodynamic stability, particularly through attenuation of heart rate responses at key surgical stress points. Postoperative complications including atrial fibrillation, acute kidney injury, neurological injury, reintubation, reoperation, ICU readmission, ICU length of stay, time to extubation, and 30-day mortality were numerically lower in the dexmedetomidine group. However these differences were not statistically significant. These findings suggest that dexmedetomidine may provide intraoperative hemodynamic benefits in patients undergoing valvular cardiac surgery, while its potential effects on postoperative organ protection and recovery outcomes require confirmation in larger multicenter randomized controlled trials. Keywords: Dexmedetomidine; cardiac surgery; valvular replacement; hemodynamics; ICU stay; outcomes
papers.translated_summary: 背景：心脏瓣膜手术伴随显著的围术期风险，包括血流动力学不稳定、心律失常、肾功能障碍及ICU住院时间延长。右美托咪定作为一种选择性α2-肾上腺素能受体激动剂，具有镇静和交感神经抑制作用，已被研究作为心脏保护辅助药物。目的：评估右美托咪定对接受瓣膜置换术的成年患者术中血流动力学稳定性和术后结局的影响。方法：本回顾性研究分析了2022年1月至2023年6月期间在体外循环下接受瓣膜手术的154例患者。患者分为C组（对照组，n=77）和D组（右美托咪定组，n=77）。D组从麻醉诱导至手术结束持续输注右美托咪定（0.5 μg/kg/h）。在预设的术中时间点测量血流动力学和镇静深度参数（心率、平均动脉压、中心静脉压、近红外光谱、熵指数）。术后结局包括拔管时间、心房颤动、急性肾损伤、1型神经损伤、再插管、再次手术、ICU再入院、ICU住院时间及30天死亡率。结果：两组基线人口学特征相似。与C组相比，D组在诱导后、胸骨切开及心包切开时心率显著降低（三个时间点p<0.001）。两组在诱导后、胸骨切开及心包切开时的平均动脉压相当，但D组在鱼精蛋白给药后5分钟的平均动脉压显著更高（77.36±7.66 vs. 73.56±8.16 mmHg，p=0.003）。D组ICU住院时间数值上较短但未达统计学意义（8.19±4.51 vs. 8.68±3.88天，p=0.480）。D组拔管时间数值上更短但无统计学差异（173.04±377.63 vs. 192.10±352.61小时，p=0.747）。D组术后并发症发生率数值上较低，包括心房颤动（11.7% vs. 13.0%，p=1.000）、急性肾损伤（11.7% vs. 14.3%，p=0.811）、再插管（9.1% vs. 10.4%，p=1.000）、再次手术（10.4% vs. 13.0%，p=0.803）、1型神经损伤（11.7% vs. 13.0%，p=1.000）及ICU再入院（11.7% vs. 13.0%，p=1.000），但这些差异均无统计学意义。D组30天死亡率数值上较低但无统计学意义（11.7% vs. 14.3%，p=0.811）。结论：心脏瓣膜手术中使用右美托咪定与术中血流动力学稳定性改善相关，尤其通过减弱关键手术应激点的心率反应。右美托咪定组术后并发症（包括心房颤动、急性肾损伤、神经损伤、再插管、再次手术、ICU再入院、ICU住院时间、拔管时间及30天死亡率）数值上较低，但差异无统计学意义。这些发现提示右美托咪定可能为接受心脏瓣膜手术的患者提供术中血流动力学获益，但其对术后器官保护和恢复结局的潜在影响需通过更大规模的多中心随机对照试验加以证实。关键词：右美托咪定；心脏手术；瓣膜置换；血流动力学；ICU住院时间；结局

papers.title: Effects of genomic recombination on SARS-CoV-2 evolution and the growth of the recombinant variant XFG in Germany
papers.translated_title: 基因组重组对SARS-CoV-2进化的影响及重组变异株XFG在德国的增长情况
papers.author: Yi, B.
papers.summary: In recent several years, multiple predominant SARS-CoV-2 variants that spread worldwide were derived from genomic recombination between SARS-CoV-2 lineages with diversified genetic backgrounds. However, the current understanding about the effects of recombination on SARS-CoV-2 evolution and functional aspects is limited. In this study, to achieve one overview regarding the evolution of SARS-CoV-2 recombinant variants, phylogenetic analyses have been performed to evaluate the divergence of representative Omicron recombinant variants from the predicted original Omicron lineage as well as the phylogenetic distances among these variants. As one example of predominant recombinant variants, we also investigated the growth of XFG in Germany by means of virus genomic epidemiology approaches. The results of the evolutionary relationship analyses indicate that recombination between evolutionarily distant lineages or closely related lineages can both drive SARS-CoV-2 evolution, and has the potential of resulting in a novel predominant strain, indicating that recombination plays one important role in SARS-CoV-2 evolution. Furthermore, this study provided information about the growth of XFG in Germany, and revealed a clear relative growth advantage of XFG over co-circulating lineages, such as LP.8.1 and NB.1.8.1. The information acquired from these investigations underlines the need for continuous efforts to detect recombination events and track recombinant variants, which is important for evaluating the long-term effects of recombination on SARS-CoV-2 evolution and of significance for public health.
papers.translated_summary: 近年来，多种在全球传播的主要SARS-CoV-2变异株源自遗传背景多样化的SARS-CoV-2谱系间的基因组重组。然而，目前对重组在SARS-CoV-2进化及功能方面影响的认识仍有限。本研究为全面了解SARS-CoV-2重组变异株的进化，通过系统发育分析评估了代表性奥密克戎重组变异株与预测的原始奥密克戎谱系之间的分化程度，以及这些变异株间的系统发育距离。以主要重组变异株为例，我们还利用病毒基因组流行病学方法研究了XFG在德国的增长情况。进化关系分析结果表明，进化距离较远或较近的谱系间重组均可驱动SARS-CoV-2进化，并可能产生新的主要流行株，表明重组在SARS-CoV-2进化中发挥重要作用。此外，本研究提供了XFG在德国增长的信息，并揭示了XFG相较于LP.8.1和NB.1.8.1等共循环谱系具有明显的相对增长优势。这些研究获得的信息强调需持续监测重组事件并追踪重组变异株，这对于评估重组对SARS-CoV-2进化的长期影响至关重要，且对公共卫生具有重要意义。

papers.title: Standardised evaluation and monitoring of site-specific AI performance with physical CT phantoms
papers.translated_title: 使用物理CT体模对特定部位AI性能进行标准化评估与监测
papers.author: Genske, U.
papers.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) applications in computed tomography (CT) imaging require objective and continuous testing, yet standardised methods for this purpose have not been established. Here, we present a framework using physical phantoms for standardised testing and monitoring of AI, demonstrated in liver lesion detection. We begin by designing phantoms tailored to the anatomical input domain expected by AI algorithms, and then systematically assess how AI performance is affected by variations in scanner technology and operation across two clinical CT systems. Next, we perform longitudinal monitoring, yielding consistent results over fifteen months on both systems. Finally, we validate clinical relevance by demonstrating that AI models trained on phantom data generalize effectively to patients and exhibit no evidence of phantom-specific adaptation. Our findings show that anatomically realistic phantoms enable standardised, site-specific testing and monitoring of AI, providing a proactive method for local and cross-institutional quality assurance.
papers.translated_summary: 人工智能在计算机断层扫描（CT）成像中的应用需要客观且持续的测试，但目前尚未建立标准化的方法。我们提出了一种使用物理体模进行AI标准化测试和监测的框架，并以肝脏病变检测为例进行演示。首先，我们根据AI算法预期的解剖输入域设计定制体模，然后系统评估扫描仪技术和操作变化对AI性能的影响，涉及两种临床CT系统。接着，我们进行纵向监测，在两种系统上十五个月内获得一致结果。最后，我们通过证明基于体模数据训练的AI模型能有效泛化至患者且无体模特异性适应迹象，验证了临床相关性。研究结果表明，解剖学逼真的体模能够实现标准化、针对特定场地的AI测试和监测，为本地及跨机构的质量保证提供了一种主动方法。

papers.title: EpiControl: a data-driven tool for optimising epidemic interventions and automating scenario planning to support real-time response
papers.translated_title: EpiControl：一种数据驱动的工具，用于优化流行病干预措施并自动化情景规划，以支持实时响应。
papers.author: Beregi, S.
papers.summary: Deciding among outbreak control policies is challenging because available data are imperfect and intervention effects are uncertain. Complex disease models can simulate the economic and health consequences of interventions, but substantial data or computational demands coupled with the specialist knowledge needed for calibration limit their real-time application. Simpler, faster and more generalised tools exist but typically they only estimate or forecast transmission dynamics under preset assumptions. We present EpiControl, a flexible tool (in R) for public health modellers to support policymaking that fits semi-mechanistic models to routine data and leverages feedback-control and model-based learning to balance complex policy-simulation with real-time responsiveness. EpiControl generates intervention scenarios that automatically update with unfolding dynamics, minimise costs, meet user-defined policy targets (e.g., suppressing epidemic peaks) and remain robust to unanticipated changes. Using Ebola virus and COVID-19 case studies, we establish how EpiControl can rapidly discover optimal intervention policies that prevent hospital overload, reduce societal disruption and retain control despite uncertain immunity, vaccination and pathogen variant dynamics.
papers.translated_summary: 在疫情控制政策的选择上，由于现有数据不完善且干预效果存在不确定性，决策过程面临挑战。复杂疾病模型虽能模拟干预措施的经济与健康影响，但校准所需的大量数据或计算资源，以及专业知识门槛，限制了其实时应用。现有更简化、快速且通用的工具通常只能在预设假设下估算或预测传播动态。我们提出EpiControl——一款面向公共卫生建模者的灵活工具（基于R语言），通过将半机制模型拟合至常规数据，并利用反馈控制与基于模型的学习方法，在复杂政策模拟与实时响应能力之间取得平衡。EpiControl可生成随疫情动态自动更新的干预方案，在最小化成本的同时满足用户设定的政策目标（如抑制疫情峰值），并对突发变化保持稳健性。通过埃博拉病毒与COVID-19案例研究，我们证实EpiControl能快速发现最优干预政策，在免疫、疫苗接种及病原体变异存在不确定性的情况下，仍可防止医院超负荷运转、减少社会干扰并维持疫情可控。
